name: a Python rule is classified to the full-stack development path (not only Node/React)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-path.sh" --rule-id g-python-no-eval --applies-to '{"linguist_aliases":["python"]}' 2>e.txt; grep -q 'development_paths=fullstack' e.txt && echo python-fullstack 1>&2
